drill_utc.window: 2026-07-16, owner-scheduled GCP mutation window, server confirmed empty

proves: The manifest-tied release cold-starts on the P7 VM from prebuilt bundle artifacts with no VM-side source rebuild (docker load + compose image pin, --no-build).
Rollback to the historical validated runtime is artifact-only and verified by exact image ID and mod DLL SHA-256 at both runtime and fallback paths.
The candidate restores after rollback and is left running; every transition is health-checked and identity-verified fail-closed.

evidence.revision_note: Local main commit; immutable once pushed. Sits above the staged A5 publication set (433f1cc) plus the drill-transport hardening and host-image commits (733eb3b, ecfaa04).
evidence.byte_stability: folder pinned -text in fieldlab/.gitattributes; blob bytes == working-tree bytes == recorded sha256 for all six files at the evidence revision

files.role: binding document: identities, execution record, live validation, receipt inventory
pre-flight plan: resolved identities, target, phases, preconditions
pre-mutation world/config archive hashes (archives stay on the VM)
candidate cold start: image identity, health, mod hashes, no rebuild
artifact-only rollback to historical runtime, verified
candidate restored and left running, verified

execution_notes: The drill resumed from a validated interrupted-run snapshot via -ResumeSnapshotRoot; the archive was captured with the server stopped and only the hash pass re-ran (details in the evidence README).

The drill script's remote transport was hardened mid-window after the driving workstation's IAP-tunneled ssh sessions failed to return output from completed remote transactions; remote state was verified untouched before each retry.
live_validation: Owner joined the promoted server with a real Valheim client immediately post-restore: notably fast world load, no desync or errors; server logs showed the 9,155,582-ZDO world load cleanly with ComfyNetworkSense active.
closes: A4 was the last active M0 checkpoint. Per the A5 receipt (docs/roadmap/m0-a5-publication-receipt.json), remaining closure is owner action: push Comfy main, push Lumberjacks master, flip roadmap golden_proof.publication to published with the resolvable permalink.
limitations: The evidence revision is immutable only after it is pushed; if Comfy history is rewritten before push, this receipt must be re-recorded.
